item.title: Does a boat float in supercritical fluid?
item.description: In this video I turn CO2 into a supercritical fluid with a boat floating on it to see what happens when the fluid passes its critical point!

media:content.media:title: Does a boat float in supercritical fluid?
media:content.media:description: In this video I turn CO2 into a supercritical fluid with a boat floating on it to see what happens when the fluid passes its critical point!

item.title: Surface trick behind this is surprisingly simple
item.description: A sauce pickup that seems impossible at first, explained by a simple surface effect in a safe, easy-to-follow science demo.

media:content.media:title: Surface trick behind this is surprisingly simple
media:content.media:description: A sauce pickup that seems impossible at first, explained by a simple surface effect in a safe, easy-to-follow science demo.

item.title: Don't put this in your coke
item.description: I make a coke rocket out of the liquid from "canned air"

media:content.media:title: Don't put this in your coke
media:content.media:description: I make a coke rocket out of the liquid from "canned air"

item.title: How much weight can a superconductor hold?
item.description: I show you how much weight a superconductor can hold on a strong neodymium magnet.

media:content.media:title: How much weight can a superconductor hold?
media:content.media:description: I show you how much weight a superconductor can hold on a strong neodymium magnet.

item.title: Liquid nitrogen in a pool
item.description: Throwing a dewar of liquid nitrogen weighted down in a pool

media:content.media:title: Liquid nitrogen in a pool
media:content.media:description: Throwing a dewar of liquid nitrogen weighted down in a pool

item.title: How to spiralize light
item.description: I show you how to spiralize light

media:content.media:title: How to spiralize light
media:content.media:description: I show you how to spiralize light

item.title: Fire reactions you've never seen
item.description: Educational look at fire reactions and basic physics in a controlled experiment.

media:content.media:title: Fire reactions you've never seen
media:content.media:description: Educational look at fire reactions and basic physics in a controlled experiment.

item.title: Why does this 4d ball look wrong?
item.description: A curious optical illusion leads to a reveal that makes the effect even stranger

media:content.media:title: Why does this 4d ball look wrong?
media:content.media:description: A curious optical illusion leads to a reveal that makes the effect even stranger

item.title: Tesla's favorite object
item.description: A small detail changes the force at play in this physics experiment, revealing why the effect works the way it does.

media:content.media:title: Tesla's favorite object
media:content.media:description: A small detail changes the force at play in this physics experiment, revealing why the effect works the way it does.

item.title: Negative mass
item.description: In this video I show you a real experiment that shows how something with a negative mass reacts to a force applied to it. Then I talk about negative mass and if it really is a physical impossibility. If it is real, then how would it react to regular mass?

media:content.media:title: Negative mass
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you a real experiment that shows how something with a negative mass reacts to a force applied to it. Then I talk about negative mass and if it really is a physical impossibility. If it is real, then how would it react to regular mass?

item.title: Waves that pull you in
item.description: I show you how tractor beam waves are made

media:content.media:title: Waves that pull you in
media:content.media:description: I show you how tractor beam waves are made
